dimensions.label: Visual harmony
dimensions.description: How coherently color, type, spacing, and composition work together.

dimensions.label: Clarity
dimensions.description: How quickly the intended hierarchy, action, and information structure can be read.

dimensions.label: Brand fit
dimensions.description: How well the candidate expresses the intended brand posture and avoids anti-keywords.

dimensions.label: Emotional appeal
dimensions.description: How desirable, confident, and affectively appropriate the surface feels.

dimensions.label: Craft quality
dimensions.description: How polished and implementation-ready the candidate is across fit, tokens, and affordances.

dimensions.label: Novelty
dimensions.description: How distinctive the design is without breaking its product and brand constraints.

dimensions.label: Brand semantic fit
dimensions.description: Kansei-style alignment between brand/tone words and the perceived design impression.

dimensions.label: Brand boundary fit
dimensions.description: How well the design avoids explicitly forbidden brand impressions and visual tropes.

dimensions.label: Product ontology fit
dimensions.description: How clearly product primitives and ontology-required signals appear in the design.

dimensions.label: Audience context fit
dimensions.description: How well the design serves declared users, platforms, and accessibility floors.

color_harmony.label: Color harmony
color_harmony.improvement: Tighten the palette around one primary accent, one neutral surface ladder, and explicit semantic roles.

spacing_consistency.label: Spacing consistency
spacing_consistency.improvement: Normalize page rhythm with shared spacing steps for section, cluster, and control gaps.

typography_balance.label: Typography balance
typography_balance.improvement: Rebalance type hierarchy so headings, body, captions, and controls use distinct but restrained roles.

composition_order.label: Composition order
composition_order.improvement: Strengthen alignment, focal sequence, and proportional grouping before adding more decoration.

hierarchy_clarity.label: Hierarchy clarity
hierarchy_clarity.improvement: Make the primary state, primary action, and next-best secondary action visible in the first scan.

contrast_legibility.label: Contrast and legibility
contrast_legibility.improvement: Raise text/background and control/border contrast while preserving the selected token roles.

content_density_control.label: Content density control
content_density_control.improvement: Reduce competing modules or group dense content into scannable rows, tables, rails, or panels.

task_focus.label: Task focus
task_focus.improvement: Move decorative or pitch-like content below the operational surface that supports the user's main task.

keyword_alignment.label: Keyword alignment
keyword_alignment.improvement: Map the strongest brand keywords to visible choices in layout, tone, density, and component emphasis.

tone_alignment.label: Tone alignment
tone_alignment.improvement: Adjust copy weight, control styling, and visual temperature to match the intended voice.

domain_fit.label: Domain fit
domain_fit.improvement: Add domain-native structures such as tables, maps, media, timelines, inspectors, or product objects where relevant.

anti_keyword_avoidance.label: Anti-keyword avoidance
anti_keyword_avoidance.improvement: Remove visual tropes that match the brand profile's anti-keywords before polishing details.

desirability.label: Desirability
desirability.improvement: Give the primary surface a more intentional visual reward: stronger imagery, tactile controls, or clearer payoff.

confidence_signal.label: Confidence signal
confidence_signal.improvement: Add evidence, provenance, precision, or stable UI states that make the surface feel trustworthy.

warmth_or_energy.label: Warmth or energy
warmth_or_energy.improvement: Tune motion, image choice, accent placement, or microcopy energy to the target audience.

responsive_fit.label: Responsive fit
responsive_fit.improvement: Verify mobile and desktop fit, then fix overflow, clipped labels, and unstable control sizing.

token_binding.label: Token binding
token_binding.improvement: Replace local visual constants with design-system tokens and keep semantic roles consistent.

accessibility_baseline.label: Accessibility baseline
accessibility_baseline.improvement: Check contrast, focus states, labels, and target sizes as part of visual polish, not after it.

interaction_affordance.label: Interaction affordance
interaction_affordance.improvement: Make controls, filters, state chips, and navigation visually legible with icons, state, and hit-area clarity.

asset_completeness.label: Asset completeness
asset_completeness.improvement: Use concrete product, place, object, identity, or content assets where the domain expects visual substance.

distinctiveness.label: Distinctiveness
distinctiveness.improvement: Introduce one memorable composition or interaction pattern while keeping the rest of the system restrained.

reference_transformation.label: Reference transformation
reference_transformation.improvement: Absorb reference morphology without copying palette, copy, IA, or protected asset choices.

memorability.label: Memorability
memorability.improvement: Create a recognizable signature in the first viewport through layout, identity asset, or product-native visual.

context.product_summary: A question-routing organization layer: a person asks in plain language, the system finds the accountable human owner, that owner answers from their own knowledge, and every answer carries its owner, trust state, and sources — with internal routing hidden from the asker.
audiences: knowledge owner accountable for a domain
anti_keywords: exposed routing internals to end users
knowledge bodies leaving the owner environment

research_basis.label: VisAWI
research_basis.operational_use: Map simplicity, diversity, colorfulness, and craftsmanship into visual system coherence metrics.

research_basis.label: APiD
research_basis.operational_use: Keep a direct pleasure/desirability layer instead of only formal pixel metrics.

research_basis.label: BeauVis
research_basis.operational_use: Treat scores as comparative, context-bound judgments rather than universal beauty values.

research_basis.label: AESTHEMOS
research_basis.operational_use: Translate brand tone and target affect into measurable emotional-response proxies.

research_basis.label: Kansei / semantic differential
research_basis.operational_use: Use brand keywords and anti-keywords as semantic impression targets and boundaries.

dimensions.label: Brand semantic fit
dimensions.description: Kansei-style alignment between brand/tone words and the perceived design impression.

dimensions.label: Brand boundary fit
dimensions.description: How well the design avoids explicitly forbidden brand impressions and visual tropes.

dimensions.label: Product ontology fit
dimensions.description: How clearly product primitives and ontology-required signals appear in the design.

dimensions.label: Audience context fit
dimensions.description: How well the design serves declared users, platforms, and accessibility floors.

brand_aesthetic_contract.rule: Brand-owned aesthetic quality is evaluated as fit to declared semantic targets, explicit boundaries, product ontology, audience context, and visual craft.

interpretation_rule: Scores represent observed or reviewed response proxies in a declared context; they are not universal beauty claims.
